TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: U Ngayngay atu Kerang ku nipangangan nu ningra i titaan tu. U aru' nu Payrang, itini i Taywan, Pikowapingan ato adihay a kasakitakit. nikakilakilac Anu pakaynin i aru' atu suwal atu lisin. Lima ku nikakilakilac: Siyen hoylio Tapu Ngawpin Zeoan
S.PHON: o~u~u ŋajŋaj ato~u~u kəraŋ ko~u~u nipaŋaŋan no~u~u niŋra i titaan to~u~u. o~u~u aro~u~uʡ no~u~u pajraŋ, itini i tajwan, piko~uwapiŋan ato~u aɬ~ɮiħaj a kasakitakit. nikakiɾakiɾaʦ ano~u~u pakajnin i aro~u~uʡ ato~u~u so~u~uwaɾ ato~u~u ɾisin. ɾima ko~u~u nikakiɾakiɾaʦ: sijən ħo~ujɾio~u tapo~u~u ŋawpin *əo~uan
S.FORM: U Ngayngay atu Kerang ku nipangangan nu ningra i titaan tu. U aru' nu Payrang, itini i Taywan, Pikowapingan ato adihay a kasakitakit. nikakilakilac Anu pakaynin i aru' atu suwal atu lisin. Lima ku nikakilakilac: Siyen hoylio Tapu Ngawpin Zeoan
S.PHON: o~u~u ŋajŋaj ato~u~u kəraŋ ko~u~u nipaŋaŋan no~u~u niŋra i titaan to~u~u. o~u~u aro~u~uʡ no~u~u pajraŋ, itini i tajwan, piko~uwapiŋan ato~u aɬ~ɮiħaj a kasakitakit. nikakiɾakiɾaʦ ano~u~u pakajnin i aro~u~uʡ ato~u~u so~u~uwaɾ ato~u~u ɾisin. ɾima ko~u~u nikakiɾakiɾaʦ: sijən ħo~ujɾio~u tapo~u~u ŋawpin *əo~uan
